mapping.a_element: 5D N=2 Yang-Mills-Einstein supergravity theories (YMESGTs) used as the model-building framework
mapping.b_element: the general D=5, N=2 gauged supergravity theory whose full Lagrangian and SUSY transformation rules are constructed

mapping.a_element: coupling of tensors / charged tensor couplings in 5D
mapping.b_element: tensor-multiplets in the general matter coupling

mapping.a_element: gauging of SU(5)/SO(10)/E(6) and non-compact gaugings
mapping.b_element: gauging of the R-symmetry SU(2)_R and a subgroup K of the isometries of the scalar manifold

mapping.a_element: homogeneous quaternionic scalar manifolds classifying the hypermultiplet scalars
mapping.b_element: the scalar-manifold geometry whose isometries are gauged
connection to type IIB on the T^{11} manifold (string/M-theory embedding)

brief_justification: Both papers work inside the identical machinery of five-dimensional N=2 gauged supergravity coupled to vector, tensor, and hypermultiplets, with gauging of scalar-manifold isometries and the quaternionic hyper-scalar geometry as the governing structure; paper B constructs the general Lagrangian and SUSY rules of this theory, while paper A applies the same YMESGT construction (its special case) to embed orbifold-GUTs, so a role-for-role mapping of multiplets and gaugings holds directly.
